summary: Auth fix verification complete. All requested features tested and working: Login with admin credentials redirects to /admin, token saved in localStorage, session persists after refresh, all pages (Homepage, Immobilier, Procedures) load without errors, ErrorBoundary NOT showing in normal operation, logout works correctly (token removed, toast shown), protected routes redirect to /connexion after logout.

console_warnings.issue: WebSocket connection to chat fails - pre-existing issue, not related to auth fix

critical_code_review_comments: Dual auth strategy (cookie + localStorage token) implemented correctly
ErrorBoundary properly catches React errors and prevents white pages
RouteLoader shows loading spinner while auth state is being validated
AuthContext correctly validates session on app load via /auth/me
Axios interceptor adds Bearer token from localStorage as fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth fix verified working. Key flows: 1) Login at /connexion with matrixguinea@gmail.com/admin123 redirects to /admin. 2) Token saved in localStorage (newsapp_token). 3) Session persists after page refresh. 4) All pages load without ErrorBoundary. 5) Logout clears localStorage and shows success toast. 6) Protected routes redirect to /connexion when not authenticated.

verified: After login, refreshing page keeps user on /admin
No ErrorBoundary showing on any page
Profile dropdown opens when clicking avatar
Logout shows success toast 'Deconnecte avec succes.'
Token and user removed from localStorage after logout
User stays logged in after navigation
DASHBOARD link visible on homepage when logged in
